response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang background, but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role: no native-level Japanese proficiency is indicated (only English, Romanian, basic German), minimal recent C programming for UNIX (only a brief stint at National Instruments 2014-2015), no demonstrated Linux kernel modification experience, and no exposure to LAN-switch security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, or chip-vendor SDKs.
strengths: Long software engineering career with diverse polyglot experience
Some embedded/hardware exposure via robotic arms and wave-field-synthesis work
concerns: Negligible recent C/UNIX systems work and no Linux kernel modification experience
Zero demonstrated background in network-switch security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP)
